meta_description: 23 years medical mask manufacturing expert with CE, FDA, SGS certifications. Daily output 1.5 million pieces. OEM/ODM service available.
hero_subtitle: CE/FDA Certified | 1.5M Daily Output | Japanese Market Approved | OEM/ODM Service
features_subtitle: Reliable partner for medical protection solutions
feature_certified_desc: CE, FDA, SGS certified with complete test reports from Chinese and Japanese testing laboratories.
feature_capacity_desc: From non-woven fabric production to finished masks, complete control over quality and supply chain.
feature_oem_desc: Customized masks with your specifications in size, material, color, and packaging requirements.
factory_desc: Located in Xiantao, Hubei - China's national non-woven products manufacturing base, with 23 years of manufacturing experience.
factory_line4: China Medical Device White List enterprise

product_kids_desc: Fun and colorful masks designed specifically for children aged under 6.

factory_hero_subtitle: 20+ years of expertise in medical mask production with state-of-the-art facilities
factory_hero_badge: ISO Certified | CE & FDA Approved | 100K-Class Clean Room
factory_video_subtitle: Take a look inside our advanced manufacturing facility
factory_capacity_subtitle: Numbers that define our production excellence
factory_advantages_subtitle: What makes us your trusted manufacturing partner
advantage_location_desc: Located in Xiantao, Hubei - China's national non-woven manufacturing base
factory_process_subtitle: Precision manufacturing with strict quality control at every step
process_step1_desc: All raw materials undergo strict quality testing before production begins
process_step2_desc: 15 fully automated production lines ensure consistent quality and efficiency
process_step3_desc: Real-time monitoring and batch testing for BFE, PFE, VFE, and breathability
process_step4_desc: Automated packaging systems with efficient global logistics
esg_subtitle: Responsible manufacturing for a sustainable future
esg_environmental_desc: We implement sustainable manufacturing with waste reduction programs, energy-efficient production lines, and solar power usage. Our factory recycles production waste and uses eco-friendly materials.
esg_social_desc: We actively support community healthcare initiatives and donate masks to hospitals and underserved communities. Our employees receive regular training and career development opportunities.
esg_ethical_desc: We maintain fair wages, safe working conditions, and equal opportunities for all employees. Our ethical employment practices include comprehensive benefits and zero-tolerance for discrimination.
factory_cta_subtitle: See our advanced manufacturing facility and quality control systems firsthand
customization_hero_subtitle: Create your branded masks with our professional manufacturing capabilities
oem_process_subtitle: A complete 6-step process from concept to after-sales support
oem_step1_desc: We discuss your requirements, target market, and branding needs. Our design team creates concepts based on your specifications.
oem_step2_desc: We produce physical samples for your evaluation. You can test quality, fit, and design before mass production.
oem_step3_desc: Once samples are approved, we begin mass production with strict quality control at every stage.
oem_step4_desc: We offer various packaging options with your branding. From individual packaging to bulk boxes.
oem_step5_desc: Final inspection and quality assurance before organized logistics and worldwide shipping.
oem_step6_desc: Comprehensive after-sales service including order tracking, customer support, and quality follow-up.
customization_options_subtitle: Complete control over every aspect of your branded masks
option_material_desc: Choose from various non-woven fabric grades and layers for optimal protection and comfort
option_colors_desc: Custom colors and branding options to match your corporate identity
option_colors_1: Mask body colors (white, blue, black, pink, etc.)
option_colors_3: Logo printing (any color as required, up to 5cm × 5cm)
option_branding_desc: Complete branding solutions from product to packaging
option_sizes_desc: Tailored to your specific market requirements and user demographics
option_sizes_3: Special nose bridge designs (double wire, foam padded)
samples_subtitle: Test our quality before placing your order
samples_desc: We provide free samples of our standard products or custom prototypes for serious buyers. Experience our quality firsthand before making your decision.
sample_custom_desc: Tailored to your specifications with technical support

virtual_tour_4: No travel required - join from anywhere

transport_air_1: Fly directly to Wuhan Tianhe Airport (major international hub)
transport_air_2: From airport to factory: 110km (approximately 1.5 hours by car)
transport_air_3: We provide airport pickup service upon request
transport_air_4: Direct flights from major Asian, European, and Middle Eastern cities
transport_station_name: Wuhan Railway Station or Hankou Railway Station
transport_rail_1: Take high-speed train to Wuhan (connected to all major Chinese cities)
transport_rail_2: From Beijing: ~4-5 hours | From Shanghai: ~4-5 hours | From Guangzhou: ~3-4 hours
transport_rail_3: From Wuhan station to factory: 1.5-2 hours by car
transport_rail_4: Station pickup service available with prior arrangement
transport_local_1: By Car: 110km via Wuhan Ring Expressway and Huhan Expressway. Travel Time: Approximately 1.5 hours depending on traffic
transport_local_2: By High-speed Rail: Take high-speed train from Wuhan Railway Station or Hankou Railway Station to Xiantaoxi Railway Station or Tianmennan Railway Station:~40-60 minutes. Take another 40 minutes to the factory by car
transport_local_3: Our Service: We arrange all ground transportation upon confirmation of your visit
transport_tip_text: We recommend arriving in Wuhan the day before your factory visit to ensure a relaxed schedule.

faq_subtitle: Quick answers to common questions about our company and services
faq_q1: Are you a factory, or a trading company?
faq_a1_1: We are the factory directly. Established in 2003, we are a certified manufacturer with over 20 years of experience in non-woven products manufacturing.
faq_a1_2: We are authorized by Chinese law to conduct import and export business, which means you work directly with the source, ensuring:
faq_a1_4: Direct quality control from production line
faq_a2_1: We specialize in disposable medical mask manufacturing with comprehensive capabilities:
faq_a2_2: OEM/ODM Production: Custom masks with your branding and specifications
faq_a2_3: Our Own Brands: 恒佳保for Chinese market; KAEI for Japanese market
faq_a2_4: Custom Branding: Logo printing on mask outer layer (any color as required)
faq_a2_5: Packaging Customization: Individual, retail, and bulk packaging options
faq_a2_6: Product Range: Adult, teen, and kids sizes; 2-4 layer options
faq_a3_1: Our manufacturing facility operates at high efficiency with substantial capacity:
faq_a3_2: Daily Output: Up to 1.5 million pieces per day
faq_a3_4: Factory Area: 100,000 square meters with 3 modern buildings
faq_a3_6: Scalability: Can increase capacity based on order requirements
faq_a4_1: We differentiate ourselves through three key advantages:
faq_a4_4: Class 2 medical device registration for disposable masks
faq_a4_5: CE and FDA certifications completed for EU and US markets
faq_a4_8: Located in Xiantao - world's largest non-woven protective equipment production base
faq_a4_9: China's only national non-woven production promotion center
faq_a4_10: National emergency medical protective material production and storage base
faq_a4_11: Complete industrial chain integration from raw materials to finished products
faq_a4_13: Established in 2003 with continuous operation since
faq_a4_14: One of the largest mask exporters to Japan (known for stringent quality standards)
faq_a4_15: Deep understanding of every detail in the supply chain
faq_a4_16: Proven track record with international clients
faq_a5_1: Absolutely! We warmly welcome business visits to our factory.
faq_a5_2:
Factory Address:
No.72, Textile Industrial Park, Yuanshi Avenue, Xiantao City, Hubei Province, China
faq_a5_3:
Location Advantage:
Our facility is conveniently located just 110km from Wuhan - the provincial capital and largest transportation hub in central China.
faq_a5_5: By Air: Fly directly to Wuhan Tianhe International Airport (WUH)
faq_a5_6: By Train: Take high-speed rail to Wuhan Railway Station or Hankou Railway Station, or even nearer: Xiantaoxi Railway Station or Tianmennan Railway Station
faq_a5_7: Ground Transportation: We arrange all onward travel from Wuhan to our factory
faq_a5_9: Factory tour of production lines and quality control facilities
faq_a5_10: Meeting with technical and management teams
faq_a5_13:
Virtual Alternative:
If travel is not convenient, we offer comprehensive virtual factory tours via video conference with live demonstrations and Q&A sessions.
faq_a5_14: To Schedule: Please contact our sales manager or use the inquiry form above to arrange your visit.

high_protection_desc: 99% BFE/PFE/VFE efficiency provides reliable protection against bacteria and particles.
teen_optimized_protection_desc: 99% BFE/PFE/VFE efficiency tailored to teen daily activities (school, sports, outdoor).
kid_optimized_protection_desc: 99% BFE/PFE/VFE efficiency tailored to kids daily activities (school, play, daycare).
dual_nose_clip_design_desc: Two independent aluminum strips provide double the adjustability for a perfect nose fit, eliminating air leakage.
breathable_comfort_desc: Excellent wearing comfort, meets the high comfort index of 'Low Breathing Resistance (ΔP ≤ 5.0 Pa).
ergonomic_fit_desc: Custom size matches adolescent facial structure, no loose gaps or over-tightening.
perfect_kid_fit_desc: Custom mini size matches children's facial structure, no loose gaps or over-tightening.
enhanced_breathability_desc: Lower breathing resistance ideal for active teens (PE class, sports, daily commute).
super_breathable_desc: Lower breathing resistance ideal for active kids (playtime, sports, daily activities).
glasses_friendly_desc: Anti-fog design prevents glasses from fogging up, ideal for daily wear by glasses users.
hypoallergenic_desc: Latex-free materials suitable for sensitive skin and allergy sufferers.
soft_ear_loops_desc: Extra-soft elastic reduces ear pain during all-day wear at school.
ultra_soft_ear_loops_desc: Extra-soft elastic reduces ear pain during all-day wear at school/daycare.
secure_seal_desc: Enhanced nose seal prevents unfiltered air from entering, maximizing protection efficiency.
fluid_resistant_desc: Resists penetration from bodily fluids, splashes, and sprays.
colorful_options_desc: Variety of trendy colors (mint, pastel pink, navy) popular among teenagers.
fun_cartoon_designs_desc: Variety of kid-friendly designs (unicorn, dinosaur, car, princess) to encourage wearing.
easy_adjustment_desc: Dual clips allow separate adjustment of upper and lower nose areas for customized comfort.
adjustable_fit_desc: Metal nose bridge can be adjusted for a secure, comfortable seal.
lightweight_design_desc: 3g lightweight construction won't weigh down teen's face during active movement.
lightweight_kid_design_desc: 2.5g lightweight construction won't weigh down kids' small faces during play.
durable_construction_desc: Reinforced nose bridge area maintains shape even after repeated adjustments.
active_lifestyle_fit_desc: Secure fit stays in place during movement, speaking, and daily activities.
quality_manufacturing_desc: Produced in 100,000-class clean room for consistent quality.

privacy_subtitle: Your privacy is important to us
privacy_section1_intro: When you use our website or services, we may collect the following types of information:
privacy_section1_item1: Personal Information: Name, email address, phone number, company name, and country when you submit inquiry forms or request quotes.
privacy_section1_item2: Business Information: Company details, website URL, and product requirements for customization requests.
privacy_section1_item3: Usage Data: Browser type, IP address, pages visited, and time spent on our website for analytics purposes.
privacy_section2_intro: We use the information we collect to:
privacy_section2_item1: Respond to your inquiries and provide customer support
privacy_section2_item2: Process and fulfill your orders and customization requests
privacy_section2_item3: Send you relevant product information and updates (with your consent)
privacy_section2_item4: Improve our website and services based on user feedback
privacy_section2_item5: Comply with legal obligations and protect our legitimate business interests
privacy_section3_intro: We do not sell, trade, or rent your personal information to third parties. We may share your information with:
privacy_section3_item1: Service providers who assist us in operating our website and conducting our business
privacy_section3_item2: Shipping and logistics partners for order fulfillment
privacy_section3_item3: Legal authorities when required by law or to protect our rights
privacy_section4_content: We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your personal information against unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction. However, no method of transmission over the Internet is 100% secure, and we cannot guarantee absolute security.
privacy_section5_content: Our website may use cookies to enhance your browsing experience. Cookies are small text files stored on your device that help us remember your preferences. You can configure your browser to reject cookies, but this may affect some features of our website.
privacy_section6_item1: Access the personal information we hold about you
privacy_section6_item3: Request deletion of your personal information
privacy_section6_item4: Opt-out of marketing communications at any time
privacy_section7_intro: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy or wish to exercise your rights, please contact us:
privacy_section8_content: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Any changes will be posted on this page with an updated revision date. We encourage you to review this policy periodically.
terms_subtitle: Terms and conditions for using our website and services
terms_section1_content: By accessing and using the H-Guardian website (h-guardian.com), you accept and agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree to these terms, please do not use our website or services.
terms_section2_intro: You agree to use this website only for lawful purposes and in a way that does not infringe the rights of, or restrict or inhibit the use and enjoyment of this site by any third party. Prohibited behavior includes:
terms_section2_item1: Harassing or causing distress or inconvenience to any other user
terms_section2_item3: Disrupting the normal flow of dialogue within our website
terms_section2_item4: Using the website to send unsolicited advertising or promotional material
terms_section3_intro: All product descriptions, images, and specifications on this website are provided for information purposes only. We reserve the right to:
terms_section3_item1: Modify product specifications without prior notice
terms_section3_item2: Limit the quantity of items available for purchase
terms_section3_item3: Discontinue any product at any time
terms_section3_item4: Refuse service to anyone for any reason
terms_section4_intro: All orders are subject to acceptance and availability. We reserve the right to refuse or cancel any order for any reason. Prices displayed on our website are:
terms_section4_item2: Exclusive of applicable taxes and shipping costs unless stated otherwise
terms_section4_item3: Listed in US Dollars (USD) unless otherwise specified
terms_section5_item1: Minimum order quantities (MOQ) apply as specified in quotations
terms_section5_item2: Custom designs require customer approval before production
terms_section5_item3: Lead times are estimates and may vary based on order volume
terms_section5_item4: Intellectual property rights for custom designs remain with the client unless otherwise agreed
terms_section6_intro: Our products are manufactured in accordance with relevant international standards and certifications as displayed on our website. We guarantee that:
terms_section6_item1: All products meet the specifications stated in their respective certifications
terms_section6_item2: Quality control procedures are followed during manufacturing
terms_section6_item3: Products are stored and shipped under appropriate conditions
terms_section7_item1: Delivery times are estimates and not guaranteed
terms_section7_item2: Risk of loss passes to the buyer upon delivery to the carrier
terms_section7_item3: International shipments may be subject to customs duties and taxes
terms_section7_item4: Shipping costs are the responsibility of the buyer unless otherwise agreed
terms_section8_intro: All content on this website, including text, graphics, logos, images, and software, is the property of H-Guardian or its content suppliers and is protected by international copyright laws. You may not:
terms_section8_item1: Reproduce, modify, or distribute any content without written permission
terms_section8_item2: Use our trademarks or branding without authorization
terms_section8_item3: Create derivative works based on our content
terms_section9_content: To the fullest extent permitted by law, H-Guardian shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages arising out of or related to your use of our website or products. Our total liability shall not exceed the amount paid by you for the specific product or service in question.
terms_section10_content: You agree to indemnify and hold harmless H-Guardian, its officers, directors, employees, and agents from any claims, damages, losses, or expenses arising from your use of our website or violation of these terms.
terms_section11_content: These Terms of Service shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the People's Republic of China. Any disputes arising from these terms shall be resolved through amicable negotiation, or failing that, through the courts of Hubei Province, China.
terms_section12_content: We reserve the right to modify these Terms of Service at any time. Changes will be effective immediately upon posting to this website. Your continued use of the website after any changes constitutes acceptance of the new terms.
terms_section13_intro: For questions about these Terms of Service, please contact us:
